title: Phase 2 — Deferred G-Buffer & PBR Shading
description: Implements the geometry pass (G-buffer write with albedo, normal, roughness, metallic, depth), the PBR deferred lighting pass (GGX specular, Lambertian diffuse, Schlick Fresnel, point/spot/directional lights, IBL from a prefiltered cubemap), and a basic tone mapping pass for display. A correct PBR deferred renderer is the foundation on which all subsequent phases build; its correctness must be validated against reference renders before proceeding. Students will validate their PBR output against provided reference renders using SSIM, profile the G-buffer memory bandwidth, and document the shading model parameters in a technical description.
